steps.title: Complete the opening modifier
steps.content: The blank starts an introductory phrase ending with by businessman William A.G. Brown. That phrase modifies the saloon, so it needs a past participle that can work with by to show who made it.

steps.title: Reject forms that break the phrase
steps.content: Choices B and D are finite verb forms, so they cannot introduce the modifier before the main clause. Choice C is an active participle and does not fit with by in this passive structure. The answer is A.
